melee_weapons.name: Dagger
melee_weapons.description: Strength: User ; Armor save: +1 ; Criticals: unarmed

melee_weapons.description: Strength: User ; Cutting Edge (-1 armor save) ; Criticals: slashing

melee_weapons.name: Double-handed weapon
melee_weapons.description: Strength: User +2 ; Two-handed ; Strike last ; Criticals: slashing/bludgeoning

melee_weapons.name: Morning star
melee_weapons.description: Strength: User +1 (1st turn only) ; Heavy ; Criticals: bludgeoning

melee_weapons.name: Flail
melee_weapons.description: Strength: User +2 (1st turn only) ; Two-handed ; Heavy ; Criticals: bludgeoning

melee_weapons.name: Spear
melee_weapons.description: Strength: User ; Strike First ; Criticals: piercing

melee_weapons.name: Sigmarite Warhammer
melee_weapons.description: Strength: User ; Concussion ; Holy (ignore saves for Undead/Possessed on 4+)

melee_weapons.name: Dwarf Axe
melee_weapons.description: Strength: User ; Cutting Edge (-1 save) ; Parry

melee_weapons.name: Fighting Claws
melee_weapons.description: Strength: User ; Pair ; +1 Attack ; Climb bonus (+1) ; Parry

melee_weapons.name: Weeping Blades
melee_weapons.description: Strength: User ; Pair ; +1 Attack ; Poisoned (-1 save)

melee_weapons.name: Steel Whip
melee_weapons.description: Strength: User ; +1 Attack ; Cannot be parried

ranged_weapons.name: Duelling Pistol
ranged_weapons.description: Range: 10" ; Strength: 4 ; Armor save: -1 ; Hand-to-hand ; Accuracy (+1 to hit)

ranged_weapons.name: Handgun
ranged_weapons.description: Range: 24" ; Strength: 4 ; Armor save: -2 ; Move or fire

ranged_weapons.name: Hunting Rifle
ranged_weapons.description: Range: 48" ; Strength: 4 ; Armor save: -1 ; Accuracy (+1 to hit) ; Pick target

ranged_weapons.name: Sling
ranged_weapons.description: Range: 18" ; Strength: 3 ; Fire twice at half range

armor.name: Heavy armour
armor.description: Save: 5+ ; Movement penalty with shield (-1 M)

items.name: Lucky Rabbit's Foot
items.description: Reroll one D6 during the game

items.name: Brazier Iron
items.description: Strength: User +1 ; Two-handed ; Set on fire (5+ roll)

items.name: Hammer of Witches
items.description: Hero hates all Chaos, Skaven, Undead, etc.

items.name: Wolfcloak
items.description: +1 to armor saves against all shooting attacks.

items.name: Ball & Chain
items.description: Range: Close Combat ; Strength: User +2 ; Random movement ; Hit friend or foe.

items.name: Squig Prodder
items.description: Allows Goblins to keep Squigs in line (+1 to Ld for Minderz).

items.name: Mad Cap Mushrooms
items.description: User becomes subject to Frenzy and gains +1 Strength.

items.name: Vodka
items.description: One-use. +1 Leadership for warband. Must test Toughness or -1 Initiative.

items.name: Double-barrelled Pistol
items.description: Hits enemy with two blasts (2x hits). Takes full turn to reload both barrels.

items.name: Double-barrelled Hunting Rifle
items.description: Hits enemy with two blasts (2x hits). Takes full turn to reload both barrels.
